verse.name: V1
verse.lines: /: Hosanna, Hosanna Hosanna in the highest. :/

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I see the king of glory Coming on the clouds with fire The whole earth shakes The whole earth shakes

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I see his love and mercy Washing over all our sin The people sing The people sing

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: /: Hosanna, Hosanna Hosanna in the highest. :/

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I see a generation Rising up to take their place With selfless faith With selfless faith

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: I see a near revival Stirring as we pray and seek We're on our knees We're on our knees

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: /: Hosanna, Hosanna Hosanna in the highest. :/

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: Heal my heart and make it clean Open up my eyes to the things unseen Show me how to love like you have loved me

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: Break my heart for what breaks yours Everything I am for Your kingdom's cause As I walk from earth into eternity

verse.name: V10
verse.lines: /: Hosanna, Hosanna Hosanna in the highest. :/
